title: Open CellIO Status Screen From VISU_MANCONTROL To View Tipper I/O Values
summary: Navigate from the Operator Station VISU_MANCONTROL screen to the CellIO screen using the CELLIO STATUS button, then view and record the cell control input and output values shown for the tipper.
when_to_use: Use when support personnel need to open the CellIO screen from VISU_MANCONTROL to observe cell control input and output values per tipper on the Operator Station HMI.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret the meaning or correctness of specific I/O states; the source only supports navigation and observation.
Do not use this procedure to change controller parameters, command words, or other settings not described in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Operator Station HMI, open VISU_MANCONTROL, navigate to the CellIO screen, review displayed values, and record them exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This is a screen navigation and observation procedure only.
The VISU_MANCONTROL screen shown in the source is identified as the screen seen by personnel logged in as maintenance.

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
Access level that allows viewing the VISU_MANCONTROL screen shown for maintenance personnel
system_preconditions: VISU_MANCONTROL screen is available on the Operator Station HMI

visual_references.description: VISU_MANCONTROL manual control screen showing the CELLIO STATUS button and related maintenance-user controls.
CellIO screen used to view cell control input and output values per tipper.
Operator station display controls used to navigate between HMI screens, including access to Visu_ManControl.

steps.title: Open the VISU_MANCONTROL screen
steps.purpose: Reach the manual control HMI screen that provides access to the CellIO status view.
steps.instruction: At the Operator Station HMI, open the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The manual control screen is visible and matches the maintenance-user screen reference.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen cannot be opened or the expected manual control screen is not displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Operator Station HMI manual control screen layout for maintenance users.
The display controls and screen navigation references showing access to Visu_ManControl.

stop_or_escalate_if: VISU_MANCONTROL cannot be accessed on the Operator Station HMI.
The displayed screen does not match the documented manual control screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The screen shown is what personnel logged in as maintenance will see; Figure 4-23 is the Operator Station HMI Manual Control Screen.
The listed control mapping includes F1 to "Visu_ManControl."

steps.title: Locate the CELLIO STATUS button
steps.purpose: Identify the control on VISU_MANCONTROL that opens the CellIO screen.
steps.instruction: On the VISU_MANCONTROL screen, locate the CELLIO STATUS button.
steps.expected_result: The CELLIO STATUS button is visible on the manual control screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The CELLIO STATUS button is present and identifiable on VISU_MANCONTROL.
steps.failure_condition: The CELLIO STATUS button is not visible or cannot be identified on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The CELLIO STATUS access point on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The CELLIO STATUS button is missing from the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
The screen layout does not provide the documented status access.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The CELLIO STATUS button opens a screen containing the cell control input and output values per tipper.

steps.title: Press CELLIO STATUS to open the CellIO screen
steps.purpose: Open the HMI screen that displays cell control input and output values per tipper.
steps.instruction: Press the CELLIO STATUS button on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen to open the CellIO screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI changes from VISU_MANCONTROL to the CellIO screen.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing CELLIO STATUS does not open the CellIO screen.

actions.label: Open CellIO
actions.exact_action: Press the CELLIO STATUS button to open the CellIO screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The CELLIO STATUS button on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen before selection.
The target CellIO screen that should appear after pressing CELLIO STATUS.

stop_or_escalate_if: The CELLIO STATUS button does not open the CellIO screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The CELLIO STATUS button opens a screen containing the cell control input and output values per tipper.

steps.title: Review the CellIO input and output values
steps.purpose: Observe the cell control input and output values displayed for the tipper.
steps.instruction: On the CellIO screen, review the cell control input and output values for the tipper.
steps.expected_result: The CellIO screen displays the cell control input and output values for the tipper.
steps.healthy_condition: The expected CellIO screen is visible and the input and output values are displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The expected cell control input and output values are not visible after opening the screen.

actions.label: Review CellIO values
actions.exact_action: Review the cell control input and output values for the tipper on the CellIO screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The CellIO screen fields showing cell control input and output values per tipper.

stop_or_escalate_if: The expected cell control input and output values are not visible after opening the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The CELLIO STATUS button opens a screen containing the cell control input and output values per tipper.

steps.title: Record the displayed values exactly as shown
steps.purpose: Preserve the observed CellIO values for troubleshooting or follow-up review.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed input and output values exactly as shown on the CellIO screen.
steps.expected_result: A complete record of the displayed CellIO input and output values is captured.
steps.healthy_condition: The values are documented exactly as displayed on the CellIO screen.
steps.failure_condition: The values cannot be fully read or accurately recorded from the screen.

actions.label: Document displayed values
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed input and output values exactly as shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed CellIO input and output values to be copied exactly.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed values cannot be read clearly enough to record exactly.
The CellIO screen does not remain available long enough to capture the values.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The CELLIO STATUS button opens a screen containing the cell control input and output values per tipper.

success_criteria: VISU_MANCONTROL is opened on the Operator Station HMI.
The CELLIO STATUS button is located and used successfully.
Cell control input and output values for the tipper are visible.
Displayed values are recorded exactly as shown.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen is available and matches the documented maintenance-user screen.
The CELLIO STATUS button is present on VISU_MANCONTROL.
The CellIO screen displays cell control input and output values per tipper.
failure_conditions: The CELLIO STATUS button cannot be found on the manual control screen.
Pressing CELLIO STATUS does not open the CellIO screen.
Expected cell control input and output values are not visible on the CellIO screen.
Displayed values cannot be recorded exactly as shown.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the CELLIO STATUS button does not open the CellIO screen.
Escalate if the expected cell control input and output values are not visible after opening the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_MANCONTROL screen and the CELLIO STATUS button.
CellIO screen showing cell control input and output values per tipper.
Display controls used to navigate to Visu_ManControl.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The CELLIO STATUS button opens a screen containing the cell control input and output values per tipper.

missing_details: The source does not define expected normal or abnormal I/O values.
The source does not provide interpretation guidance for the displayed CellIO values.
The source does not specify whether production must be stopped before performing this screen-viewing procedure.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
